    Classes in org.jscience.natural.biology that implement SimulationAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Individual
    Represents an individual organism - a single instance of a species.
    class 
    SocialCollective<T extends Individual>
    Represents a collective of biological or social agents (individuals or subgroups).
    class 
    SocialEntity
    Base class for all social entities (individuals or collectives).

  • Uses of SimulationAgent in org.jscience.social.economics

    Classes in org.jscience.social.economics that implement SimulationAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Bank
    Represents a banking institution capable of managing accounts and providing currency conversion services.
    class 
    Community
    Represents a primitive or cooperative social group where resources are shared.
    class 
    EarthEcosource
    A class representing the Earth as an autonomous organism that produces, stores, and recycles materials.
    class 
    Factory
    An organization specialized in mass production and transformation of resources.
    class 
    Holding
    An organization that owns and controls multiple other companies (organizations).
    class 
    Organization
    Represents a formal social and economic entity (Company, NGO, Government).

  • Uses of SimulationAgent in org.jscience.social.politics

    Classes in org.jscience.social.politics that implement SimulationAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Administration
    Represents a state-managed administrative organization (agency, ministry, police, etc.).
    class 
    Nation
    Represents a sovereign nation or organized human group (modern tribe).
    class 
    PoliticalParty
    Represents a political party organized for democratic participation and governance.

  • Uses of SimulationAgent in org.jscience.social.psychology.social

    Classes in org.jscience.social.psychology.social that implement SimulationAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Crowd
    Represents a transient gathering of individuals (a crowd) sharing a common physical proximity and motive, but lacking the structured relations found in a Group.
    class 
    Family
    Represents a nuclear or extended family group.
    class 
    Group
    Represents a group of individuals from a psychological and social perspective.
    class 
    HumanGroup
    Represents a group of human individuals (Homo Sapiens).
    class 
    Tribe
    Represents a human tribe, which is an organized human group with a distinct name and culture.

  • Uses of SimulationAgent in org.jscience.social.sociology

    Classes in org.jscience.social.sociology that implement SimulationAgent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Family
    Represents a family unit within the social structure.
    class 
    Group
    Represents a formal or informal social group of individuals.
    class 
    Human
    Represents a human individual.
    class 
    Person
    Represents a human individual as a social agent.
    class 
    Society
    Represents a society, defined by its type, culture, institutions, and geographic location.
